narrative:
Copley Twp A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,311 registered voters, with 61.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
